plugin.name: ThreeS_MIP
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.purpose: 3Scapes MIP protocol: handshake, stats (FFF), glines, Viking BBE feed
plugin.description:
Port of mip.tin + the vmip part of vmap.tin.
Does the 3klient handshake on connect, parses #K%id MIP lines (gagged), and publishes the data for the other 3S plugins: hp, hpmax, sp, spmax, gp1, gp1max, gp2, gp2max, enemy_name, enemy_hp, gline1, gline2, uptime, reboot, lag, vmip_ser (KEY=VALUE lines of the whole Viking BBE feed)
Commands: mipecho on|off - show/hide raw MIP lines mipdebug on|off - debug prints

alias.send: SetTriggerOption("mip_line", "omit_from_output", "%1" == "on" and "n" or "y") mip_set_echo("%1" == "on") Note("MIP echo: %1")

muclient.script:
math.randomseed(os.time())
mip_debug = false local mipid = GetVariable("mipid") local needs_handshake = false local got_packet = false local hs_tries = 0 local my = {} -- stats local vmip = {} -- viking BBE feed local sess = {}
local VMIP_SUBCODE = "BBE"
local function dbg(s) if mip_debug then ColourNote("silver","", "[mip] "..s) end end
-- strip 3k gline colour tags like <r <g <y > and colour-words local function colorconv(s) s = s:gsub("[<]([bcgrsvwy])", "") s = s:gsub(">", "") s = s:gsub("gre[ya]y?:", ""):gsub("red:", ""):gsub("green:", ""):gsub("blue:", ""):gsub("yellow:", "") return s end
local function split2(s, sep) local t = {} local pat = "(.-)" .. sep local last, n = 1, 0 for part, pos in s:gmatch(pat .. "()") do n = n + 1; t[n] = part; last = pos end n = n + 1; t[n] = s:sub(last) return t end
local function push_vars() local function sv(k, v) SetVariable(k, tostring(v or "")) end sv("hp", my.hp); sv("hpmax", my.hpmax) sv("sp", my.sp); sv("spmax", my.spmax) sv("gp1", my.gp1); sv("gp1max", my.gp1max) sv("gp2", my.gp2); sv("gp2max", my.gp2max) sv("enemy_name", my.enemy_name); sv("enemy_hp", my.enemy_hp) sv("gline1", my.gline1); sv("gline2", my.gline2) sv("uptime", sess.uptime); sv("reboot", sess.reboot); sv("lag", sess.lag) sv("seid", vmip.SEID) local out = {} for k, v in pairs(vmip) do out[#out+1] = k .. "=" .. v end sv("vmip_ser", table.concat(out, "\n")) end
local function process_FFF(data) -- wire format: FLAG~VALUE~FLAG~VALUE~... (single-tilde delimited) local toks = split2(data, "~") for i = 1, #toks - 1, 2 do local flag, val = toks[i], toks[i + 1] if #flag == 1 then if flag == "A" then my.hp = val elseif flag == "B" then my.hpmax = val elseif flag == "C" then my.sp = val elseif flag == "D" then my.spmax = val elseif flag == "E" then my.gp1 = val elseif flag == "F" then my.gp1max = val elseif flag == "G" then my.gp2 = val elseif flag == "H" then my.gp2max = val elseif flag == "I" then my.gline1 = colorconv(val) elseif flag == "J" then my.gline2 = colorconv(val) elseif flag == "K" then if val ~= "" then my.enemy_name = val else my.enemy_name = ""; my.enemy_hp = "" end elseif flag == "L" then my.enemy_hp = val elseif flag == "N" then my.round = val end end end push_vars() BroadcastPlugin(1, "stats") end
local function process_BBE(data) local t = split2(data, "%^%^") for i = 1, #t - 1, 2 do if t[i] ~= "" then if t[i] == "VMAPH" and vmip.VMAPH ~= t[i + 1] then SetVariable("vmaph_time", tostring(os.time())) end vmip[t[i]] = t[i + 1] or "" end end push_vars() BroadcastPlugin(2, "vmip") end
-- tells / two-way comms (BAB): marker~source~message local function process_BAB(data) local marker, source, msg = data:match("^(.-)~(.-)~(.*)$") if not source or source == "0" or source == "" then return end local text if marker == "x" then text = "To " .. source .. ": " .. msg else text = source .. ": " .. msg end BroadcastPlugin(3, "Tell\1" .. text) end
-- broadcast channels (CAA): command~channel~source~message local function process_CAA(data) if data:find("[PARTY] GOLD divvy called by", 1, true) or data:find("[PARTY] All gold divvied", 1, true) or data:find("[PARTY] coins called by", 1, true) or data:find("[PARTY] Divvy of", 1, true) then return end local command, channel, source, msg = data:match("^(.-)~(.-)~(.-)~(.*)$") if not channel or msg == nil or msg == "" then return end BroadcastPlugin(3, channel .. "\1" .. msg) end
function mip_line(id, _skip, flag, data) if id ~= mipid then return end got_packet = true dbg(flag .. " " .. data) if flag == "FFF" then process_FFF(data) elseif flag == VMIP_SUBCODE then process_BBE(data) elseif flag == "AAC" then sess.reboot = data; push_vars() elseif flag == "AAF" then sess.uptime = data; push_vars() elseif flag == "BAE" then sess.lag = data; push_vars() elseif flag == "BAA" then Note(data) elseif flag == "BAB" then process_BAB(data) elseif flag == "CAA" then process_CAA(data) end end
-- ===== packet-level gagging ===== -- The display trigger only fires on COMPLETE lines, so MIP lines that -- arrive split across packets flash on screen before being omitted. -- Strip them from the raw stream instead; the trigger stays as fallback. local pkt_tail = "" local echo_raw = false
function mip_set_echo(on) echo_raw = on end
local function consume_mip_line(line) local pre, id, skip, flag, data = line:match("^(.-)#K%%(%d%d%d%d%d)(...)(...)(.*)$") if id then mip_line(id, skip, flag, data) return pre or "" end return nil end
function OnPluginPacketReceived(s) if echo_raw or not mipid then return s end s = pkt_tail .. s pkt_tail = "" local out, pos, len = {}, 1, #s while pos <= len do local nl = s:find("\n", pos, true) if nl then local line = s:sub(pos, nl) if line:find("#K%", 1, true) then local pre = consume_mip_line((line:gsub("\r?\n$", ""))) if pre == nil then out[#out + 1] = line -- contained '#K%' but wasn't MIP elseif #pre > 0 then out[#out + 1] = pre .. "\r\n" -- keep text that preceded the marker end else out[#out + 1] = line end pos = nl + 1 else local tail = s:sub(pos) if tail:find("#K", 1, true) and #tail < 4096 then pkt_tail = tail -- might be a split MIP line: hold it else out[#out + 1] = tail end break end end return table.concat(out) end
function mip_start() SendNoEcho("3klient " .. mipid .. "~~MUSHclient" .. Version()) SendNoEcho("3klient LINEFEED on") SendNoEcho("3klient HAA off") SendNoEcho("forcehp") Note("[MIP] handshake sent (id " .. mipid .. ")") hs_tries = hs_tries + 1 if hs_tries <= 3 then DoAfterSpecial(10, "mip_retry_check()", sendto.script) end end
function mip_retry_check() if got_packet then return end Note("[MIP] no data yet - retrying handshake") mip_start() end
-- the in-game prompt never appears during login, so this is the safe -- moment to handshake after a fresh connect function mip_prompt_seen() if needs_handshake then needs_handshake = false mip_start() end end
function mip_manual_start() hs_tries = 0 got_packet = false mip_start() end
-- restore the last known viking feed (map rows etc.) after a plugin -- reload - the mud only re-sends most of it when something changes local function restore_vmip() local s = GetVariable("vmip_ser") if not s then return end for line in s:gmatch("[^\n]+") do local k, v = line:match("^([^=]+)=(.*)$") if k and vmip[k] == nil then vmip[k] = v end end end
local function ensure_id() if not mipid or mipid == "" then mipid = string.format("%05d", math.random(0, 99999)) SetVariable("mipid", mipid) end end
function OnPluginConnect() ensure_id() needs_handshake = true got_packet = false hs_tries = 0 end
function OnPluginInstall() ensure_id() restore_vmip() if IsConnected() then -- mid-session install: we're already logged in got_packet = false hs_tries = 0 DoAfterSpecial(2, "mip_start()", sendto.script) end end
